name: QVQ-72B-Preview
tagline: Experimental visual-reasoning model built on Qwen2-VL-72B, adding step-by-step reasoning over images.
metaDescription: QVQ-72B-Preview (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2024-12 — part of the QwQ / QVQ (reasoning preview) line. Experimental visual-reasoning model built on Qwen2-VL-72B,…
overview: QVQ-72B-Preview is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the QwQ / QVQ (reasoning preview) line. Released 2024-12. Standalone open reasoning models that pioneered Qwen's chain-of-thought 'thinking' approach before it merged into the main Qwen3 family.
What's notable in this version: Experimental visual-reasoning model built on Qwen2-VL-72B, adding step-by-step reasoning over images.
